description:
This quiz assesses practical knowledge of modern CSS, testing familiarity with current styling techniques and best practices. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty level, using a light‑hearted, instructional tone that encourages learners to gauge their resume‑ready CSS skills. The format is multiple‑choice, aiming to both evaluate and reinforce key concepts.
Topics: CSS fundamentals, Modern layout methods (Flexbox, Grid), Responsive design, CSS preprocessors and variables, Browser compatibility
Audience: Front‑end developers, web designers, and students preparing for technical interviews or looking to validate their CSS expertise for résumé inclusion.
